title: Christchurch Family Deals
meta_desc: Discover the best family deals in Christchurch, including activity discounts, campervan hire, and travel insurance, for a fun and affordable South Island holiday.
intro: Christchurch is a fantastic destination for families, with plenty of activities and attractions to enjoy. With the right deals and discounts, you can have a fun and affordable holiday in the South Island. From discounted activities to affordable accommodation, we've got the inside scoop on the best family deals in Christchurch.

sections.heading: Current Booking Deals and Discounts
sections.body:
Bookme.co.nz is offering up to 40% off activities in Christchurch, including the International Antarctic Centre and the Christchurch Gondola. Discover Cars has campervan deals from $89/day, perfect for families who want to explore the South Island. Booking.com has a range of holiday parks and motels with free cancellation on most bookings.

Cover-More Family Travel Insurance provides comprehensive cover from $4.50/day, giving you peace of mind while you're on holiday.
list: Up to 40% off activities with Bookme.co.nz
Campervan hire from $89/day with Discover Cars
Free cancellation on most bookings with Booking.com
Comprehensive travel insurance from $4.50/day with Cover-More

sections.heading: Best-Value Activities
sections.body:
Christchurch has plenty of affordable activities for families, including the Canterbury Museum, which is completely free. The Christchurch Art Gallery is also free, with rotating exhibitions and kids' programmes.

The International Antarctic Centre is a must-visit, with interactive exhibits and real Antarctic gear. The Christchurch Gondola has stunning views of the city and the Southern Alps.

sections.heading: Money-Saving Tips for Families
sections.body:
To get the most out of your holiday in Christchurch, consider visiting during the off-season (April to May or September to November) when prices are lower. Book your activities and accommodation in advance to get the best deals.

Look for package deals that include accommodation and activities, and consider hiring a campervan for a fun and affordable way to explore the South Island.
list: Visit during the off-season (April to May or September to November) for lower prices
Book activities and accommodation in advance for the best deals
Look for package deals that include accommodation and activities
Consider hiring a campervan for a fun and affordable way to explore the South Island
Pack a picnic lunch instead of eating out for every meal
Take advantage of free activities like the Canterbury Museum and Christchurch Art Gallery

sections.heading: When to Book for Best Prices
sections.body:
To get the best prices on activities and accommodation in Christchurch, book at least 2-3 months in advance. This will give you access to early bird discounts and special offers.

Consider booking during the off-season (April to May or September to November) when prices are lower. Keep an eye on the Bookme.co.nz website for last-minute deals and discounts.
